text:
# April 16, 2026  
- Morning started with Browny barking at the mailman. Preeti was still sleeping.
- Dropped Neetish at school on the way to office. She forgot her water bottle.
- Office: major client presentation went well. Boss appreciated the team's work.
- Lunch with colleagues at the canteen. Discussed the upcoming cricket match.
- Preeti called: Mohan had a fever. She took him to the doctor.
- Left office early to check on Mohan. He was fine, just a viral.
- Evening: gave the kids a bath. Browny tried to jump in the tub.
- Preeti made dal chawal. Simple but tasty.
- Bedtime story for Mohan. He requested a dragon story again.
- Planning the weekend trip to the mall with family.
name: Chunk 1/1
